data.body: STATE: OPEN, NOT built — pending the escalated design. Docs + ADR (docs/adr/NNNN-opcert-asymmetric.md) covering env-attribution, low/high-security postures, authoritative-state-fetch integrity, out-of-band trust root, merge-gate enforcement, HMAC removal + migration; xref ADR 0046 (accepted limitations: no transparency log, single-env/no-threshold, and now the anti-rollback/era-anchor gap). Write once the stronger model settles ee0b/8f1d/4214-era-anchor so the ADR documents the final model (esp. the era-anchor resolution: era-at-HEAD vs independent monotonic anchor).
